title: OceanVillage
description: New structure in the ocean - Ocean Villages
body: This mod will add a new type of village - a village in the ocean. There is a central point, several houses and streets, and a pen for animals. Spawn villages in all oceans except the icy ones. From loot, you can find diamond and iron items in the forge, as well as fishing rods and fish. The distance between villages is up to 2400 blocks.
